skills.name: Smooth Fence USA — Fence installation & repair
skills.description: Northeast Florida fence contractor. Use this skill to answer questions about Smooth Fence USA's services (vinyl/aluminum/chain-link/wood), service areas (Flagler/Volusia/St. Johns/Duval/Putnam counties), pricing approach, gate options, warranty, financing partners (Hearth/Affirm/Afterpay/Klarna), HOA & permits process, and how to request a quote.
